member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.AI.Agents.GeneratorAgentBase.InternalGenerateTyped``1(System.String,System.String[],System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Respects the caller's generic type parameter instead of forcing GeneratedTextResponse. Use this when you need typed responses (e.g., List<MainPage>).

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.AI.Agents.GeneratorAgentBase.InternalGenerate(System.String,System.String,System.String[],System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Backward compatibility - forces GeneratedTextResponse wrapper type. Consider using InternalGenerateTyped<T> for typed responses.

member.name: M:Hazina.Tools.AI.Agents.GeneratorAgentBase.InternalGenerate(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Backward compatibility - forces GeneratedTextResponse wrapper type. Consider using InternalGenerateTyped<T> for typed responses.
